case_title: NASIR PATEL VS. RICHARD RANDOLF DODDS

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DODDS, RICHARD RANDOLF
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT DODDS, RICHARD RANDOLF SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DODDS, RICHARD RANDOLF

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DODDS, RICHARD RANDOLF THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: BROADWAY HOTEL, 2048 POLK STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 #205, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR SERVED SEP-16-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DODDS, RICHARD RANDOLF
